summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed for 16 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions are planned; all items are preserved for normal maintainer review or narrower follow-up because merge/fix are blocked by job policy and low-signal closeout is disabled.
